name: IdsEdwDrugClmCmpndIngrFRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'CLAIMS' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE MyTable SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS MyTable JOIN cte ON MyTable.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND MyTable.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND MyTable.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD WHERE MyTable.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND MyTable.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:

ZENA JOBNAME:  OPTUMRX_IDS_EDW_DRUG_CLM_CMPND_INGR_WKLY_000

CALLED BY:  IdsEdwDrugClmCmpndIngrFSeqCntl

JOB NAME:  IdsEdwDrugClmCmpndIngrFRunCycUpd

Description:  This Job update the P_RUN_CYC  table.

Modifications:

Developer                      Date            Project/User Story             Change Description                                                                Development Project    Code Reviewer            Date Reviewed
-------------------------             -----------------   ----------------------------------------  --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------   ----------------------------------   ---------------------------------   -------------------------
Velmani Kondappan      2020-10-02  F-209426/US217375         Initial Programming.                                                                 EnterpriseDev2          Jaideep Mankala    12/19/2020

Annotations:
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS CLM_COB  with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
Description: This Job update the P_RUN_CYC  table .
